note: GTA V world map (multiple visual styles) + the world->image coordinate transform used to place markers (players, blips, positions) on the map. The styles all share one coordinate system (gtamap.xyz Leaflet CRS), so a marker's normalized position is identical on every style; only pixel sizes differ. Calibration is the linear transform proven in a working FiveM radar overlay. game (x,y) -> map pixel -> normalized UV / CSS percent. No joaat hash, no categories.
source: Map images: GTA V community renders (satellite 8K, atlas, road). Calibration: gtamap.xyz Leaflet CRS (pixel_x = 0.66304*game_x + 3753.6 ; pixel_y = -0.656*game_y + 5529.6 on the 8192x8192 reference), as used in the Scooby radar overlay.

styles.name: Satellite (8K)
styles.description: 8K photographic satellite render of San Andreas. High detail, large file (~26 MB).

styles.name: Atlas (8K)
styles.description: 8K stylized in-game atlas map (green land / cream desert / blue water). Clean, readable, good for overlays (~19 MB).

styles.name: Road (8K)
styles.description: 8K pastel road map — muted land with prominent road/highway network. Lightest file (~7 MB).
